description: Denies `git commit -m` with a multi-line or non-ASCII message, which shell quoting mangles silently, and points at `git commit -F <file>`. Requires bun; silently skipped when bun is not installed

hooks.command: if command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then bun run "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/scripts/guard-commit-message.ts"; fi
